title: 日本ダービーの後に・二冠めっ！！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Do you see now? This is what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I'll be rooting for you in the next race! Don't let
me down!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You know it! I'll take home first place for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Tokai Teio points two fingers
decisively up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: You can do it! You got this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! I did it! I won the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm pretty great, huh? That's one step
closer to Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've come so far. I won't stop until I become Triple
Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Tokai Teio's fervor, she'll make her dream
come true for sure!
choice_data_list: Now, let's do it again in the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'll be back to the grind starting tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hehe... Seems like I'm a bit tired. My foot's
cramping.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio shines gloriously as she brings home
the Double Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sights are set on the final race, the one that
will award her the title of Triple Crown
champion—the Kikuka Sho!
